name: Coupang, Inc.
business: Coupang is a technology company providing retail, restaurant delivery, video streaming, and fintech services to customers in over 190 countries. It operates through two segments: Product Commerce and Developing Offerings. The company serves millions of customers and small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) through brands including Coupang, Eats, Play, Rocket Now, and Farfetch.
sellsTo: Customers in over 190 countries and territories

exposures.sentence: We have invested billions of dollars to expand artificial intelligence (AI) technologies and other innovations, helping to accelerate the growth of hundreds of thousands of SMEs around the world.
Our approach focuses on controlling the entire end-to-end experience from technology and automation to fulfillment and logistics so we can continually raise the bar for what customers expect.
Our fulfillment and logistics by Coupang offering in Korea (FLC) empowers merchants by offering them access to our industry-leading fulfillment, logistics, and customer network services.

Coupang is a technology and Fortune 150 company listed on the New York Stock Exchange that provides retail, restaurant delivery, video streaming, and fintech services to customers under brands that include Coupang, Eats, Play, Rocket Now, and Farfetch.
